title: Aeronautics Flight HUD
description: Simple Flight HUD for Create Aeronautics Vehicle
body:
This mod adds Simple Flight HUD for Create Aeronautics(sable) Vehicle. HUD is automatically activated when seated on Vehicle.

This mod displays
- Airspeed (Left side, blocks/sec)
- Altitude (Right side, just shows Y coordinate)
- Flight Path Marker
- Pitch Ladder
- Heading Direction

When you seated Vehicle, you might be need to Calibrate Vehicle direction with V key (by default) until marker faces to the correct direction.

You can toggle HUD visibility with H key (by default).

This project is my first project. so may contains some bugs.
